subcodes.first_line: O thou who art named with the letters MHS! Hearken unto that which the Dawning-Place of Names calleth unto thee, when grievous tribulation hath encompassed Him. Verily, there is no God but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: م ح س ان استمع ما ینادیک به مطلع الاسماء اذ احاطه سوء القضاء انه لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
